description: Merge all miniSEED waveform files from the SeisComP SDS archive located at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/ into a single time-sorted output file at ~/merged_waveforms.mseed. Generate a text-based record inventory listing of all traces contained in the merged file and save it to ~/waveform_inventory.txt. The inventory must include the network code, station code, channel code, and time range for each trace.
